---
title: 'Circle of Life Cycles'
date: '2014-04-26T04:49:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1609506945402095298'
blogger_filename: '/2014/04/circle-of-life-cycles.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Poetic Playground?'
---

<br />
<b>Thus the circle of life cycles; ebbs and flows.&nbsp;</b><br />
<b><br /></b>
There was a moment in time.<br />
<br />
It was <i>that </i>moment.<br />
<br />
The moment everything changed.<br />
<br />
The change happens. The bud comes forth.<br />
<br />
The flower blooms. The flower dies.<br />
<br />
The plant appears to die.<br />
<br />
But... it comes in circles.<br />
<br />
It's not dead.<br />
<br />
It's merely hibernating.<br />
<br />
Spring comes, winter thaws.<br />
<br />
Leaves push forth, new stems, a bud appears.<br />
<br />
<br />
<b>Thus the circle of life cycles; ebbs and flows.&nbsp;</b><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
